g.title: Process
g.desc: I was a UK resident in one or more of the previous 3 tax year...
g.text: I was a UK resident in one or more of the previous 3 tax years, but I spent fewer than 16 days in the UK in the current year

g.title: Process.8
g.desc: I spent fewer than 46 days in the UK in the current tax year,...
g.text: I spent fewer than 46 days in the UK in the current tax year, and I was non-UK resident in the previous 3 years

g.title: Process.10
g.desc: I worked full-time outside the UK and spent fewer than 91 day...
g.text: I worked full-time outside the UK and spent fewer than 91 UK days and had fewer than 31 UK workdays of more than 3 hours, with no significant break

g.title: Process.25
g.desc: I spent 183 days or more in the UK in the current tax year
g.text: I spent 183 days or more in the UK in the current tax year

g.title: Process.27
g.desc: I meet the qualifying UK home test, including the days there, ...
g.text: I meet the qualifying UK home test, including the UK and overseas-home presence conditions

g.title: Process.29
g.desc: I meet the full-time UK work test for a qualifying break
g.text: I meet the full-time UK work test for a qualifying 365-day period, including the 75% condition

g.title: Process.38
g.desc: I spent 16-45 days in the UK in the current tax year
g.text: I spent 16-45 days in the UK in the current tax year

g.title: Process.42
g.desc: I spent 46-90 days in the UK in the current tax year
g.text: I spent 46-90 days in the UK in the current tax year

g.text: I spent 91-120 days in the UK in the current tax year

g.title: Process.44
g.desc: I spent over 120 days in the UK in the current tax year
g.text: I spent over 120 days in the UK in the current tax year

g.title: Process.49
g.desc: I have at least 4 ties in the UK
g.text: I have at least 4 ties in the UK

g.title: Process.69
g.desc: I have at least 3 ties in the UK
g.text: I have at least 3 ties in the UK

g.text: I have at least 2 ties in the UK

g.title: Process.81

g.text: I have at least 1 tie in the UK

g.title: Sheet.90
g.desc: Family members in the UK (e.g. spouse or children) Accommodat...

text.tspan: Family members in the UK (e.g. spouse or children)
Accommodation (a place to stay which is available to you for a continuous period of 91
40 or more UK workdays of more than 3 hours
More than 90 days spent in the UK in at least one of the previous two tax years
More days spent in the UK than in any other country during the tax year.
